facebook.caption: Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc earns its name every single evening. Sitting right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, this 4.5-star-rated resort gives guests a front-row seat to some of the most vivid sunsets on the island. With 680 reviews backing it up, the consistency here speaks for itself. Whether you're after a relaxed poolside afternoon or a beachfront evening drink, this spot delivers that easy, unhurried Phu Quoc energy foreign visitors come looking for. Practical tip: book a west-facing room or arrive at the beach bar early evening to catch the golden hour at its best.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sky turn gold right from the shoreline at Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc. The clips say it all, warm water, glowing horizon, cold drink in hand. This is what a Phu Quoc sunset actually looks like when you find the right spot for it.

instagram.caption: Sunsets hit different at Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc. Rated 4.5 stars across 680 reviews, this beachfront retreat on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is your sign to plan that golden hour properly. Pro tip: arrive early to claim your spot.
instagram.video_caption: Golden skies, warm sand, zero regrets. Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc is living up to every bit of its name, and the view from the beach proves it.
